However, in a separate proposed rule, HUD is also considering removing its discriminatory effects regulations and deferring to courts on questions related to disparate impact liability under the Fair Housing Act, which would mark a shift from its current stance [2]. As of the latest finalized action, though, the 2013 discriminatory effects standard remains in place [3].
